results.desc: A1 zero console errors/exceptions at load + over 10s running
A2 <title>, canvas visible in initial viewport, render loop on rAF
A3 terrain on load, not monochrome (<90% one color, >=2 colors)
A4 blocks read as 3D (shading / >=2 block colors, not flat silhouettes)
B5 >=16x16 solid-column footprint, every column solid (connected ground)
results.detail: bbox 20x13, 260 solid cols, filled 100% — judge footprint/connectivity from screenshot

results.desc: B6 procedural height variation (max-min column height >= 2)
B7 y up; player camera eye above terrain surface
C8 click canvas -> pointer lock; Escape releases; instructions before lock
results.detail:
click locks (engaged); Escape release UA-guaranteed (not deliverable headlessly); instructions: "FPS: 33
Click to lock mouse  •  WASD to move "

results.desc: C9 mouse movementX yaws, movementY pitches, pitch clamped +/-pi/2
C10 WASD moves rel. to yaw; time-based; finite; no endless fall
results.detail: W 3.00u @0deg; S reverses; A/D strafe; y bounded

results.desc: D11 crosshair fixed at exact screen center
results.detail: DOM crosshair element centered on viewport

results.desc: D12 center-ray voxel raycast; reach within [4,12] blocks
results.detail: reach >=4 (near target hit) and <=12 (far target missed); ray from screen center

results.desc: D13 left-click removes exactly the targeted block; scene updates
results.detail: left-click removed targeted block; blockCount -1; center pixel diff 50.0

results.desc: D14 right-click places one block on targeted face; no overwrite; ctx menu suppressed
results.detail: right-click placed exactly +1 on targeted face; no overwrite; context menu suppressed

results.desc: E15 window.__voxel exists + functional without pointer lock
E16 reported angle convention (yaw0->-Z, forward = -sinYcosP, sinP, -cosYcosP)
results.detail: yaw convention confirmed at two orientations (dot 1.00, 1.00); pitch-up sign is JUDGE-confirmable

results.desc: E17 hook place +1 / remove -1 remesh scene (pixels change <=2 frames)
results.detail: blockCount +1/-1 ok; center pixel diff place=36.0 remove=36.0

results.desc: F18 live labeled FPS counter derived from real rAF timing
F19 idle average FPS over 5s >= 30
F20 25 place() calls < 2s, no errors, following 5s fps >= 30
G21 invalid place/remove return false, no throw, no corruption
G22 resize + tab background/refocus: no throw/error, FPS recovers
